product_overview: QueenLib is a PHP/MySQL library management system providing secure user registration, email verification, session-based authentication, password reset, and a user dashboard for account management. It emphasizes strong security controls (bcrypt hashing, token-based verification, HTTPOnly SameSite cookies) and robust input validation.
core_goals: Provide secure user registration with 24-hour email token verification
Allow verified users to log in with bcrypt-hashed passwords and 1-hour session timeout
Support secure password reset using 1-hour email tokens
Expose a dashboard and account management to verified, logged-in users
Prevent common security issues (SQL injection, XSS, session fixation) and ensure safe defaults for cookies and tokens

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new user account, persist an unverified user record with a 64-character verification token, and send a verification email with a link.
user_flows: Navigate to /register.php -> Fill in first name -> Fill in last name -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Fill in password confirmation -> Submit registration form -> See redirect to /library_betonio/verify-otp.php?email=USER_EMAIL -> See flash 'Registration successful! Check your email to verify your account.'
Navigate to /register.php -> Fill in all required fields using an email already in the system -> Submit registration form -> See error 'Email already registered'
Navigate to /register.php -> Leave one or more required fields empty -> Submit registration form -> See error 'All fields are required'
Navigate to /register.php -> Fill in password with fewer than 8 characters -> Submit registration form -> See error 'Password must be at least 8 characters'
Navigate to /register.php -> Fill in password and a non-matching confirmation -> Submit registration form -> See error 'Passwords do not match'
Navigate to /register.php -> Fill in invalid email format -> Submit registration form -> See error 'Invalid email address'

features.name: Email Verification (Token-Based)
features.description: Verify a new user's email by validating the 64-character token from the verification link and set the account to verified within a 24-hour window.
user_flows: Navigate to /verify-otp.php?email=USER_EMAIL&token=VERIFICATION_TOKEN -> System validates email + token and checks created_at < 24 hours ago -> See redirect to /library_betonio/login.php -> See flash 'Email verified! You can now log in.'
Navigate to /verify-otp.php?email=USER_EMAIL&token=EXPIRED_TOKEN -> System checks timestamp and finds token > 24 hours old -> See error 'Verification link expired' with links to register/login
Navigate to /verify-otp.php?email=USER_EMAIL&token=INVALID_TOKEN -> System fails to find a matching user record -> See error 'Invalid verification link'
Navigate to /verify-otp.php (missing email parameter) -> System detects missing email -> See redirect to /register.php
Navigate to /verify-otp.php?email=USER_EMAIL (missing token) -> System detects missing token -> See processing message indicating invalid or incomplete link

features.name: User Login & Session Management
features.description: Authenticate verified users using bcrypt password comparison, create a session with HTTPOnly SameSite=Strict cookies, and enforce a 1-hour inactivity timeout.
user_flows: Navigate to /login.php -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> System verifies credentials and is_verified=1 -> See redirect to /library_betonio/index.php -> See flash 'Login successful!'
Navigate to /login.php -> Fill in email that exists and incorrect password -> Submit login form -> System fails authentication -> See error 'Invalid email or password'
Navigate to /login.php -> Fill in credentials for an unverified account -> Submit login form -> System detects is_verified=0 -> See redirect to /library_betonio/verify-otp.php?email=USER_EMAIL
Login successfully -> Remain idle for more than 1 hour -> Attempt to access /library_betonio/index.php -> See redirect to /library_betonio/login.php with timeout message
Login successfully -> Navigate between pages within 1 hour -> Observe session persists and user data is available in dashboard

features.name: Password Reset (Request & Reset)
features.description: Allow users to request a password reset which sends a 64-character token valid for 1 hour, and enable resetting the password when a valid token is presented.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password.php -> Fill in email -> Submit reset request -> System generates 64-character reset token and emails link -> See redirect to /library_betonio/login.php -> See flash 'If an account exists, you will receive a password reset email.'

Navigate to /forgot-password.php -> Fill in an email not present in the system -> Submit reset request -> System does not reveal account existence -> See redirect to /library_betonio/login.php -> See the same generic flash message

Navigate to /reset-password.php?email=USER_EMAIL&token=RESET_TOKEN -> Observe form with pre-filled email -> Fill in new password -> Fill in password confirmation -> Submit reset form -> System validates token is unexpired (< 1 hour) and passwords match -> See redirect to /library_betonio/login.php -> See flash 'Password reset successfully!'
Navigate to /reset-password.php?email=USER_EMAIL&token=EXPIRED_TOKEN -> System finds token expired (> 1 hour) -> See error 'Reset link expired'
Navigate to /reset-password.php?email=USER_EMAIL&token=INVALID_TOKEN -> Submit reset form -> System fails token validation -> See error 'Invalid or expired reset token'
Navigate to /reset-password.php?email=USER_EMAIL&token=RESET_TOKEN -> Fill a weak new password (< 8 chars) -> Submit reset form -> See error 'Password must be at least 8 characters'
Navigate to /reset-password.php?email=USER_EMAIL (missing token) -> See error 'Invalid reset link'

features.name: Dashboard & Account Management
features.description: Provide a personalized dashboard and account view to verified, logged-in users showing greeting, email, verification status, member since, and links to account actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /library_betonio/index.php while authenticated -> System validates session and verification -> See greeting 'Hi, [First Name]' and account summary including email and member since
From dashboard navigate to /account.php -> See account management options and ability to initiate password change or profile updates
Navigate to /library_betonio/index.php while not authenticated -> System detects missing or expired session -> See redirect to /library_betonio/login.php with timeout or not-logged-in message
Navigate to /library_betonio/index.php with a profile name containing script payload -> System escapes output -> See sanitized name with no script execution

features.name: Logout
features.description: Terminate the user's session, clear session data, show a logout confirmation, and prevent access to authenticated pages via the back button.
user_flows: While authenticated navigate to /logout.php -> System clears session data and cookies -> See redirect to /library_betonio/login.php -> See flash 'You have been logged out successfully.'
After logout use browser back to return to /library_betonio/index.php -> System detects no valid session -> See redirect to /library_betonio/login.php
Invoke /logout.php when session already cleared -> System ensures _SESSION['user_id'] is empty -> See redirect to /library_betonio/login.php
